# Caldera Agency

> Done-for-you websites for solo consultants. We research your background, write the copy, design and build the site, and host it. We send a free working prototype before you pay anything.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://www.caldera.agency/): What Caldera does and how the free-prototype process works
- [Best website agency for consultants](https://www.caldera.agency/best-website-agency-for-consultants): Why Caldera is built specifically for solo consultants
- [Consultant websites: the complete guide](https://www.caldera.agency/consultant-websites): The definitive guide to websites for independent consultants
- [Process](https://www.caldera.agency/process): Step-by-step, prototype-first, milestone-paid process
- [About](https://www.caldera.agency/about): Founder story and why Caldera only works with consultants
- [Contact](https://www.caldera.agency/contact): Get in touch or request a free prototype

## For specific consultants
- [Websites for fractional CFOs](https://www.caldera.agency/for/fractional-cfo)
- [Websites for executive & leadership coaches](https://www.caldera.agency/for/coaches)
- [Websites for independent advisors & consultants](https://www.caldera.agency/for/advisors)

## Writing
- [Best website options for consultants in 2026](https://www.caldera.agency/blog/best-website-builder-for-consultants): Squarespace vs Wix vs custom vs done-for-you
- [Do consultants need a website?](https://www.caldera.agency/blog/do-consultants-need-a-website)
- [How much does a consultant website cost?](https://www.caldera.agency/blog/how-much-does-a-consultant-website-cost)
- [LinkedIn vs your own website for consultants](https://www.caldera.agency/blog/linkedin-vs-website-for-consultants)
- [Why every consultant needs a website](https://www.caldera.agency/blog/why-consultants-need-websites)
- [The authority paradox](https://www.caldera.agency/blog/the-authority-paradox)

## Facts
- Caldera builds websites exclusively for solo and independent consultants (fractional CFOs, coaches, advisors, and similar).
- Clients receive a free working prototype before paying anything.
- Payment is milestone-based; clients approve each phase, and final payment is due only at launch.
- Clients get full code ownership of their code, domain, and content, with no proprietary platform and no lock-in.
- One year of hosting and support is included.
- Most clients spend less than two hours total across the entire project.
- Founded by Stefanos Bellos, formerly of the Dialectica expert network, who spent thousands of hours connecting consultants with investors and global enterprises.
- Real clients include Mark S. Piazza (fractional CFO), Dr. Ron Paul (Polaris Leadership Institute, leadership coaching), and Tim Scott (True North Supply Chain Advisory).
- Contact: contact@caldera.agency
